seo.title: VIP Membership - SmartMall
seo.description: Become a SmartMall VIP member for exclusive discounts, higher points, free shipping, and priority support.

hero.title: More status - more rewards
hero.description: Become a VIP member to unlock exclusive offers, higher points, priority support, and a better SmartMall shopping experience.

quickBenefits.title: Higher points
quickBenefits.description: Earn more reward points on every order.

quickBenefits.title: Nationwide freeship
quickBenefits.description: Shipping benefits based on your plan.

plansSection.title: Choose the right VIP plan
plansSection.description: Compare Silver, Gold, and Diamond quickly to choose the plan that fits your shopping needs.

plans.name: Silver
plans.description: A good starting plan for customers beginning with VIP benefits.

plans.name: Gold
plans.description: Balanced benefits across savings, reward points, and shipping.

plans.name: Diamond
plans.description: For frequent shoppers who want the highest VIP benefit level.

comparisonSection.title: Compare benefits
comparisonSection.description: A summary of key benefits by VIP membership level.

benefitsSection.title: Featured VIP benefits
benefitsSection.description: Benefits designed to make shopping faster, more rewarding, and better supported.

benefits.title: Exclusive discounts
benefits.description: Receive member-only offers in eligible SmartMall campaigns.

benefits.title: Higher points
benefits.description: Earn rewards faster and redeem benefits sooner.

benefits.title: Nationwide freeship
benefits.description: Save shipping costs on eligible orders.

benefits.title: 24/7 support
benefits.description: Get priority help for advice, order checks, or issue handling.

faqSection.title: Frequently asked questions
faqSection.description: Key information before choosing and paying for a VIP plan.

faqs.question: What is VIP Membership?
faqs.answer: VIP Membership is a paid member program that gives you shopping discounts, higher points, and priority SmartMall support.

faqs.question: How do I become a VIP member?
faqs.answer: Choose a plan, sign in, create a VIP plan order, and complete payment.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my VIP plan?
faqs.answer: You can request a plan change when SmartMall opens VIP plan management for accounts.

faqs.question: Do VIP benefits apply to promotional products?
faqs.answer: Some benefits may not stack with other promotions. Specific conditions will appear during payment.

cta.title: Become a VIP member today
cta.description: Enjoy a premium shopping experience and stronger benefits reserved for VIP members.
